action.reasoning: Observation: Ridge regression NLinear-style achieved new best MSE=0.4648 (was 0.4867). Analysis: Closed-form ridge with lambda=1000 works better than SGD. Now I have ridge_W_tv.npy trained on train+val combined which should be even better since test follows val temporally. Let me try submitting that, plus explore: (1) higher lambda values, (2) combining decomp (DLinear-style) with ridge. Decision: First submit ridge_W_tv.npy to see if more data helps.
